flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbus State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Columbus State University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (19.4% → 23.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Columbus State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (61.0% → 69.7%).
